programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty investigates craft beer, meeting a couple who gave up jobs in the NHS to pursue their dream lifestyle of brewing and selling ale. Kate Quilton goes in search of the perfect tomato and finds herself in the middle of the world's biggest food fight at a festival in Valencia, and Matt Tebbutt examines why tinned anchovies taste salty when fresh ones don't, visiting a processing plant to find out

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Amber and Colin turn their bedroom into a dream vintage haven. After an initial assessment, the presenter begins by getting rid of any mass-produced furniture

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bonnie Motley from Hertfordshire is looking to improve her quality of life, and is convinced buying a holiday home in the guaranteed sunshine of southern Spain is just the way to do that. With friend of 30 years Jonathan along to help her with the decision, Ben Hillman shows Bonnie five properties within her £20,000 budget

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting Windsor to meet Pete and Phil, who rent out cars to the film and TV business. Henry finds an Austrian moped which is missing an engine, while Simon picks a fibreglass suit of armour

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Max McMurdo head for Crewe to meet rock and roller Billy, who lives in a house that is frozen in time in the 1950s

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: A company is contacted by a man who is trying to track down the rest of his family after his cousin dies, and the beneficiaries of a Roman Catholic priest's will embark on a journey to learn about his remarkable dedication to his Manchester parish. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: A couple begin to offer package holidays at their French gite, two novice wine-makers finally move house, and the owners of a fishing business hope to impress their latest guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Cimon in Torquay, Devon, where owners Mark and Jo Warden hope their four-star establishment will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Cardinal's Hat in Worcester, where owner Nigel Smith has decades of hospitality experience, but Mark and Jo are concerned by the condition of the bedding

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Third to host this week are husband and wife duo Russ and Karen Colman, who hope their glamping site in Cledan Valley, mid-Wales, will win over their rivals

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lucinda Renshaw welcomes the guests to Springfield House B&B in Instow, Devon, where things get off to a good start - until one couple realise they do not have a lock on their door

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they've been paid and to settle some scores. The Cimon is first and hosts Mark and Jo want to question Karen and Russ about their breakfast feedback. Next, Nigel from The Cardinal's Hat wants clarity on some cleaning and hygiene comments made by Mark and Jo. Russ and Karen from Cledan Valley are third and are keen to put Mark and Jo straight. Finally, it's Springfield House and owner Lucinda and friend Diane want to put two of the guests at ease, but it's the payments where true feelings are expressed

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: The team investigates the case of a man who spent the last years of his life on the Essex coast, and the search for his relatives leads the heir hunters to Wales. Plus, members of a family who have connections to 19th-century transatlantic communications, and details of more unclaimed estates

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Malindi the eastern black rhino is pregnant, but she's not her usual self. After giving birth unexpectedly during the middle of the day, the keepers hope that her lively baby, Jumaane, will bring her out of her shell and restore her independent spirit. Dusky pademelon males Kai and Aru have been fighting with each other, so the staff decide to split them up

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Rebecca struggle to get their kilometre-long driveway ready for the arrival of their guests. Amy and Marc unearth an original medieval fireplace

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Clinton Dall from West Sussex, a self-made businessman and father of four aiming to build one of the largest homes ever featured on the show. Dall wants the end project to be perfect - from the finish of his mirrored cruciform steel columns, to how the floor tiles line up with the dining room table, and is willing to spend whatever it takes to achieve his vision. However, the construction represents a huge risk, as down one road lies abject failure and financial ruin, while down the other, is the creation of something sublime and almost heroic

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton meets Olwen and Ben, who are embarking on a daring self-build in the picturesque town of St Andrews. But building something new in the oldest part of this medieval Scottish town is not for the faint-hearted, and soon both their timescale and budget expands - as does their family

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Peter Maddison meets Dion and Turi, who have big plans but a limited budget to build a harbourside home in Greenwich, New South Wales, with a lap pool running all the way through

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Home: Building for a Billionaire
programme.desc: Following the complex build of an extraordinary home costing millions in Mayfair, London, which belongs to self-made billionaire and philanthropist John Caudwell. Having sold Phones 4u in 2006 for just under 1.5 billion pounds, John is now aiming to create one of the most lavish and expensive homes ever to be renovated in Britain. As the build enters the crucial final stages, the programme follows this unique and challenging engineering project as a team of expert trades people and interior designers attempt to pull off one of the most extraordinary renovations in Britain

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: As the Allies' advances stall, the Canadians seize Hitler's island fortress to open up the vital port of Antwerp and keep the war moving

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: The Allies entered Germany and ran into the imposing Siegfried Line defences. American troops fought to a gruelling, bloody standstill in the Huertgen Forest, at a terrible cost

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: Hitler's launch of his great counter-offensive against the unsuspecting Allies in the Ardennes. This was the Nazis' last gamble in the West to turn the tide of the war

programme.title: WW2 - Battles for Europe
programme.desc: The Allies reached the last great natural barrier between their forces and the German heartland. If they could get across the River Rhine, the war would be won

programme.title: Spy in the Snow
programme.desc: Undercover cameras reveal how living in the snow tests animals to their limit. In New Zealand, cameras follow a group of kea parrots, revealing how friendship is at the heart of the lives of these sociable and highly intelligent birds. In the North Pole, cameras get up close to play-fighting polar bears, while on the other side of the planet at the South Pole, footage reveals the parental devotion that emperor penguins have as they try to secure the survival of their offspring and face some of the harshest conditions on Earth. In Tasmania, the spy wallaby finds love - discovering along the way an interesting courtship technique among wombats

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of marine life in different environments around the north, beginning with a tropical coral reef which has medicinal properties for dolphins, and is used as a tool by tusk fish. In Japan, a shipwreck is home to the Asian sheepshead wrasse, which can change gender, while in the polar north, walruses struggle to find ice floes for their pups to rest on as climate change takes its toll on the environment

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live in volcanic hot spots on the ocean bed, areas that reach temperatures hot enough to melt lead and which may hold the secrets behind all life on Earth. Other strange creatures from the depths of the sea include bone-eating worms, fish that walk rather than swim, and hordes of squid. Plus, footage of sharks in a feeding frenzy over the dead body of a whale and the wildlife of the Midnight Zone in the Pacific, an area that never receives any natural light, forcing creatures to rely on their own bioluminescence

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, small predators that scientists believe are as intelligent as chimpanzees. These creatures have a remarkable aptitude for communication to the point where they can interact with other species including octopi and work together to catch prey. Plus, footage of a vast spawning event involving several different species of fish, coral and invertebrates, and time-lapse photography of coral polyps growing and dying, creating a structure visible from space

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Wildlife that live thousands of kilometres from land, featuring footage of baby turtles using debris as life rafts and whales sharks embarking on lengthy voyages across the Pacific to the point where it is safest to give birth. Special pressure-proof cameras are used to film sperm whales hunting for squid a kilometre beneath the surface and the impact of plastic pollution on the oceans is revealed

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of wildlife inhabiting underwater kelp forests, including thousands of giant cuttlefish spawning along a restricted area of rocky reef off the south coast of Australia. Males outnumber females 11 to one, which leads to fierce competition. Larger males use brute force to drive off competition, while their smaller rivals use deception by mimicking the appearance of females. The programme also features tiger sharks hunting for green turtles in fields of seagrass and spider crabs trying to avoid predators while they shed their shells

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live on the coast, including sea lions working in packs to hunt tuna in the shallows and moray eels that venture out of the water to seek out food on dry rocks. Puffins must brave predators to bring a mouthful of food back to their young and king penguins go without food for a month while they moult. Plus, footage of the bizarre Leaping Blenny, a fish that hates the water

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: The series concludes with a look at the ways human activity can impact on aquatic wildlife, including albatrosses unwittingly feeding their offspring plastic, mother dolphins with contaminated milk, and communications between animals being disrupted by noise. However, there are signs of hope, including the thriving Norwegian Spring-Spawning Herring, previously on the brink of extinction, and efforts to save endangered species like the whale shark and to preserve the eggs of giant leatherback turtles

programme.title: The Buildings That Fought Hitler
programme.desc: Britain needed to produce vast amounts of ammunition. Chatham Docks on the Medway saw 142 ships set sail, and bomber bases sprung up across the country

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: The Spanish island of Villa Winter, which was suspected of being a port for German U-boats and part of a larger plan to invade the United States

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles, a liquid oxygen factory and two launch pads

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The construction of the Vajont Dam in the mountains of northern Italy, and the catastrophic flood in 1963 that caused the deaths of 2000 people

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The stories behind an abandoned Second World War aviation facility in Farnborough, a Soviet airbase in the Gobi Desert, and a disused furnace in Pittsburgh

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Independent, a skyscraper in Austin, Texas. At a height of 690ft, it is the tallest building in the city, surpassing the 683ft Austonian, another residential skyscraper

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the first leg of his second journey, Michael Portillo heads to Kirkcaldy in Fife, finding out along the way how the mill town of Preston in Lancashire gave birth to the Temperance Movement. In Blackpool, he enjoys a performance in the Tower Ballroom and discovers the railways had a direct impact on the town's birth as a resort. After a stroll along the pier with local comedian Joey Blower, Michael visits Morecambe Bay

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo embarks on the second leg of his journey from Preston to Kirkcaldy, returning to the historic Settle-Carlisle line he helped save from dereliction when he was Minister of State for Transport in the 1980s. Here, engineer Tony Feshini describes what life was like for the people who originally built Ribblehead Viaduct, before Michael visits Dent, Cumbria, home to the highest railway station in England

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team make a return visit to Helmingham Hall in Suffolk. Paul Atterbury meets a man whose family have painstakingly constructed an entire working model fairground - complete with helter-skelter, Ferris wheel and carousel. Fiona has fun with a unique piece of Donald Trump memorabilia, a vanity set from his private yacht. Plus, Clive Farahar values a document signed by Elizabeth I and Mark Smith is enchanted by a rare First World War medal

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.desc: The Nordland Line, the longest in Norway at 453 miles. Stretching between Trondheim and Bodo, it was first built to transport the country's greatest natural resource - iron ore

programme.desc: Three rare Alvises get the auction buyers going when put under the hammer. A Chevy Corvette which started its journey in Saudi Arabia makes its way to Thornton le Dale for the sale

programme.desc: The German police's attempts to catch a depraved and psychotic killer, who struck fear into women travelling on Berlin's S-Bahn train network during the Second World War

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo continues his journey following George Bradshaw's footsteps, as the third leg of his trip from Preston to Kirkcaldy sees him embarking on a two-day tour of the Lake District. He begins in Windermere, where he travels by steamboat to the north of the lake, and continues to Claife viewing station, where he learns about the water pollution caused by increasing levels of tourism. He spends the night in Grasmere, and the following day reaches Kendal, where he buys local delicacies and meets a farmer who explains the impact of railways on farming practices

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo reaches Carlisle, where he meets a descendant of the Border Reivers, a group of ancient lawless clansmen mentioned in Victorian train enthusiast George Bradshaw's book. programme.desc: Ceramic conservator Kirsten Ramsay carefully restores a cherished but chipped piece of 1960's pottery, but with pieces missing and a highly polished finish to mimic Kirsten has her work cut out. programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea takes on the restoration of a once brightly coloured wooden carousel horse, while ceramics conservator Kirsten Ramsay is charged with the task of repairing a little cat teapot with an extraordinary wartime story behind it. Plus, Will Kirk takes on the repair of a 3D wooden boat puzzle

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Radio expert Mark Stuckey has a job on his hands, repairing a 1930s transistor radio brought into the Repair Shop by David Hill from Brecon. The radio was given to David's father by an army officer on the beaches at Dunkirk during the Second World War, and after being successfully shepherded through the bullets and the crashing waves to safety, it became the Hill family's pride and joy. However, the subsequent years have not been kind, with the vintage transistor battered and broken both inside and out. A battered leather gaming case and a grandfather clock with a poignant history are also given a new lease of life

programme.title: The Repair Shop

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first of the week's dinner parties in Medway, Kent, is hosted by experimental cook and retired grandmother Nina Gaskell. Her guests are barmaid Laura Leibo, police worker Esther Kennedy, mortgage adviser Michael Dodsworth and art graduate Patrick Fysh, and she hopes to impress them with her unusual dishes including a cucumber stuffed with corned beef, and gravy with coconut

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Laura Leibo hosts the second party in Medway, Kent, but struggles to cope with the stresses of the task. She hopes her improvised cheesecake and questionable gravy will be forgotten when she invites her guests to take part in a robotic dance-off in her kitchen - with Nina Gaskell grabbing the opportunity to show off a hidden talent

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Police communications officer Esther Kennedy hosts the third dinner party in Medway, Kent. She has very high standards and believes everything has to be just so, with nice cutlery, matching plates and impeccable glassware. But the key thing is her gourmet menu, which may or may not prove a hit with her fellow diners. However, Esther does end the night by treating her guests to an impromptu rock performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Patrick Fysh hosts the fourth dinner party in Kent, and hopes to impress with his molecular gastronomy. However, Michael Dodsworth is confused by the 21-year-old's interest in surrealist feminist art, and Nina Gaskell is left speechless by risque pictures of his girlfriend

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Michael Dodsworth hosts the final dinner party in Medway, Kent, and decides to keep his menu simple by preparing Thai chicken cakes, jambalaya and raspberry and lime sorbet. He also arranges games including pinata, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse (2018)
programme.desc: After being bitten by a radioactive arachnid, student Miles Morales develops incredible abilities, and becomes a version of Spider-Man. When a super collider device opens a gateway to other dimensions, Miles crosses paths with five counterparts to stop a threat for all realities. Oscar-winning animated adventure, with the voices of Shameik Moore and Nicolas Cage

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo Salt and her daughter Frankie hope to buy a holiday home near Benalmadena in Spain's Costa del Sol for the whole family to enjoy quality time in. Working to their budget of £130,000, Ben Hillman shows them five potential properties

programme.title: 21 Day Body Turnaround with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five volunteers to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. Initial testing reveals all of them to likely be at risk from debilitating conditions such as diabetes, high blood pressure, heart disease, chronic inflammation and stress. Most have the aerobic fitness age of someone at least 20 years older. In the first episode, Michael investigates their digestive health and starts them out on a new training plan in conjunction with GP and fitness trainer Dr Folusha Oluwajana

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Hotels
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at some of Britain's grandest hotels during a challenging time for the hospitality industry. The first episode focuses on the Lamgham in London, where a suite can cost up to £25,000 a night, and follows staff as they prepare to reopen after lockdown. To celebrate the reopening, there's a brand-new take on the traditional afternoon tea, with celebrity chef Michel Roux Jr in charge of the revamped menu

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner: 10 Years and a Lovely Bit of Squirrel
programme.desc: A celebration of Robert Popper's comedy Friday Night Dinner, to mark its 10-year anniversary. The sitcom, which coined the catchphrase 'lovely bit of squirrel', centred on the fortunes of the eccentric Goodman family and their even more surreal neighbour Jim. With behind-the-scenes material and never-before-seen outtakes, this documentary features interviews with stars including Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Mark Heap and Tracy-Ann Oberman. It also includes the thoughts of celebrity fans Claudia Winkleman, Joe Thomas, David Baddiel and Jessica Hynes

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Documentary featuring one of the most emotional and heart-rending stories ever filmed - that of Noel Fitzpatrick's own dog, Keira. In September 2020, Noel's life was turned upside down when the 13-year-old border terrier was hit by a van right outside the practice. Having sustained a ruptured abdominal lining and urinary bladder, a crushed sacrum and pelvis and a dislocated hip, Noel's colleagues worked tirelessly to repair extensive internal damage. Suddenly, the surgeon renowned for finding solutions for even the most challenging injuries, had to steel himself for the most important surgery of his life

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&Bers enjoy the great outdoors at Eden Valley Glamping in Cumbria, a site with a back-to-basics approach - but a dusty bathroom and damp duvets put a crimp in the guests' stay

programme.desc: West Midlands paramedics Paul Johnson and Alex Flashwood rush through traffic, searching for a father and his two-month-old baby, who has stopped breathing

programme.desc: The journalist and doctor asks five volunteers to put their lives in his hands as he attempts to turn their health around in just 21 days. Most have the aerobic fitness age of someone at least 20 years older. programme.title: The Anti-Vax Conspiracy
programme.desc: An investigation into the international anti-vaccination movement and its message that Covid-19 is a myth and part of a government plot to inject people with dangerous vaccines. The documentary goes inside the world of the 'anti-vaxxers', ranging from those profiting from lethal fake cures to Piers Corbyn, brother of the former Labour leader, who has compared the vaccine rollout to experiments in wartime concentration camps

programme.desc: Jermaine Jenas examines the controversial policing policy, giving black men issued with hidden cameras the chance to share their experiences of being stopped and searched. The programme examines the scale of the issue, and its wide-reaching social, psychological and personal consequences for black men, who are nine times more likely to be stopped and searched than white men

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles present as the pastry chefs are challenged to make a cube-shaped dessert, with sharp edges from every angle, and magical confections that look exactly like mushrooms but taste anything but - all in just three and a half hours. Which team will rise to the occasion?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with three house-hunters with two very different needs, but one shared goal. In 2018, schoolteacher Katy, her comedian husband Charlie, baby daughter Lola, and pet pooch Harper were on the hunt for their first family home in Brighton. Having moved in with Katy's mum to save for a deposit, they had not only grown used to home comforts, but also the vibrant village atmosphere of pricey Fiveways - an area where their property dreams didn't match their budget. With Phil's help they widened the net, viewing four fantastic finds in and around Brighton. Two years later, Phil's back to see whether life on the coast has been plain sailing. And in 2019, Kirstie was scouring east London with 'granny on the go' Janet. programme.desc: Presenter Sara Damergi goes house-hunting on Spain's Costa Blanca for Viv and Steve Jenkins, who have a budget of £130,000 and want a property they can use for holidays and their eventual retirement

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sara Damergi helps John and Julia Baxter search for a retirement home in the Orihuela Costa area of Spain. The couple are desperate to escape the cold British winters, and have a budget of £100,000 to spend on the right property

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Promotions representative Dawn Griffiths hosts the first dinner party in Middlesbrough, and has confidence in her Asian-themed evening of curry and traditional Indian dancing. However, her rowdy guests - practical joker Ron Gordon, market trader Kay Griffiths, teacher Karena Serdecka and refuse collector Paul Tidy - prove hard to please

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Practical joker Ron Gordon hosts the second party in Middlesbrough, but despite his expertly cooked food, his hopes of an evening of elegance are placed in jeopardy by market trader Kay Griffiths, who dominated proceedings the previous night, but irritated her fellow diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Self-confessed loudmouth Kay Griffiths hosts the third dinner party in Middlesbrough, hoping to liven up her guests with good food, colourful conversation, a little conflict and her home-made punch

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drama teacher Karena Serdecka hosts the fourth dinner party in Middlesbrough, treating her guests to a Dutch and Polish menu, before taking to the stage to sing with her band

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Refuse collector Paul Tidy hosts the final evening in Middlesbrough, throwing a film star-themed party in the hope of impressing his guests. His plans take a turn for the worse when one of his diners expresses a dislike of garlic, which happens to be one of the chef's favourite ingredients, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Joshua and Lee's search for the perfect chateau with a music venue potential continues in western France. The heat is on for Tim and Margreeth as they host 14 guests for their first fine dining and floristry weekend in the newly updated library

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Liverpool couple Karen and Peter find a holiday home in the Tarragona region of Catalonia, Spain, that has enough space to accommodate a yoga retreat

programme.title: Britain's Most Luxurious Hotels
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at some of Britain's grandest hotels during a challenging time for the hospitality industry. The first episode focuses on the Lamgham in London, where a suite can cost up to £25,000 a night, and follows staff as they prepare to reopen after lockdown. To celebrate the reopening, there's a brand-new take on the traditional afternoon tea, with celebrity chef Michel Roux Jr in charge of the revamped menu

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: Tom Allen and Liam Charles present as the pastry chefs are challenged to make a cube-shaped dessert, with sharp edges from every angle, and magical confections that look exactly like mushrooms but taste anything but - all in just three and a half hours. And that's just their first task. For their second, judges Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden ask them to create a heroes and villains-themed showpiece adorned with 160 macarons. Which team will rise to the occasion?

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: The recruits are put into pairs and tested on their ability to cope with chemical warfare. They are exposed to CS gas and challenged to carry out a fast-paced extraction carried out in near freezing water. Those who are unable to work well with their partner will be eliminated from the contest - while those who do will be required to take each other on in hand-to-hand combat

programme.title: Tom Allen's Quizness
programme.desc: Contestants' general knowledge is put to the test as they play for the chance to win £25,000. Here, Fiona, George, Rosa and Paddy fight it out for a shot at the jackpot, facing tricky questions on anything from egg fried rice to Katie Price

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Lela's, a California restaurant that is currently being run into the ground by its inexperienced owner. Gordon tries to turn the failing business around, but faces opposition from the chef and makes enemies when he exposes the suspect behaviour of some members of staff

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastian's, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzio's two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner: 10 Years and a Lovely Bit of Squirrel
programme.desc: A celebration of Robert Popper's comedy Friday Night Dinner, to mark its 10-year anniversary. The sitcom, which coined the catchphrase 'lovely bit of squirrel', centred on the fortunes of the eccentric Goodman family and their even more surreal neighbour Jim. With behind-the-scenes material and never-before-seen outtakes, this documentary features interviews with stars including Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter, Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Mark Heap and Tracy-Ann Oberman. It also includes the thoughts of celebrity fans Claudia Winkleman, Joe Thomas, David Baddiel and Jessica Hynes

programme.title: Rich Kids, Skint Holiday
programme.desc: Return of the documentary. Roumaissa, a wealthy 19 year old used to luxury holidays, takes a break in Great Yarmouth with the Cope family from Bedford. She tries to cope with managing the family's modest daily budget as well as a spider

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Documentary following British people living it up on the Costa del Sol. Bambi shows newcomers Howard and Lynne around the caravan park and treats them to a Bollywood evening. But unaware to the couple the host has recently gone vegan, so it turns out to be a meat-free knees-up. Kim and Matt reopen their chip shop after a devastating fire which forced them to shut for a year and Harrison is down on the marina, trying to sell tickets for the Black Pearl pirate ship tour

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: When the Beast from the East and storm Emma collide, Paddington's managers debate whether to close the station completely, something that has happened on very few occasions since World War II. There is excitement among the staff as the Duke and Duchess of Sussex board a train to Cardiff, but a rail defect at Didcot threatens to upset their journey

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams aiming to clean up the country, including internet entrepreneur Martin, and his partner-in-grime Glen, who have had enough of the fly-tippers plaguing their beloved Hampshire countryside and have decided to fight back using all means at their disposal. In the North East, the Howdon Sewage Treatment plant not only cleans over 12,000 litres of waste water a second, but even manages to turn it into a gas used to heat homes across the region. But to do it, head honcho Tony has to make sure his plant remains blockage free under a constant assault from wet wipes, sanitary products, false teeth and even the occasional 20ft python

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Thieves dragging a stolen generator on one wheel along town and country roads cause chaos, smashing the barriers on a closed level crossing and coming close to causing a train crash. A van with a surprising load is tracked using state-of-the-art technology in a game of cat and mouse, and a high-stakes hunt for a stolen van and mini-digger on the M1 nearly leads to carnage. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: A murder suspect is pursued and trapped in Bradford by a task force of traffic cops and officers from a homicide unit. Meanwhile, another squadron of cars is deployed to catch a speeding car-theft suspect, whose risk-taking only ends when he hits a tree. Across the county, the cops are forced to intervene when a drink-driver is attacked by residents who want revenge for the damage he has done to their parked cars. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Charlie and Paul are in pursuit of a dangerous driver who failed to stop and sped off down the busy M1 motorway. It takes a stinger operation to stop the suspect, but the interceptors are in for a surprise when they see who is behind the wheel. Meanwhile, officers search for a stolen car, and a man is caught driving under the influence with his child in the car

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Nick pulls over an uninsured driver who refuses to give his details, Steve tackles a drink-driver who has blown out two tyres and Nick and Bob chase down a suspicious looking van with false registration plates. Sophie and Adie hunt for a man linked to multiple sexual assault charges and a reckless Audi driver is chased through Wakefield city centre

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Documentary following the work of a high-speed police interception unit. Nick and the team perform a textbook tactical pursuit and containment on a suspected cloned car, and a drunk driver in Bradford attempts to escape the police. Meanwhile, officers look into the case of a hit-and-run in west Yorkshire

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. His last port of call is to a miniature pincher who objects to any men coming near its owner

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Bea causes trouble with Levi thanks to the release of her new podcast, and Mackenzie agonises over Hendrix's declaration of feelings

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Nikau is hesitant about his new start at the big city modelling agency. Tori and Christian decide to go ahead with a ceremony in three weeks' time

programme.title: Rich House, Poor House
programme.desc: Single-mum Anna, who lives on the breadline, swaps lifestyles with two successful men who live in apartments in a Victorian mansion in Leeds. Anna lives in the small town of Keighley and her minimum-wage job leaves her with less than £60 a week for food, clothes and emergencies. In contrast, best mates Matt and Daniel have the money to indulge in luxuries and plenty of time to spend with their children, and Matt even owns a fleet of luxury cars, including a chauffeur-driven Rolls-Royce and a yellow Ferrari

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Skint
programme.desc: A 24-year-old with her own successful business who has never left her parents' mansion goes to stay in a council flat, and pays a visit to a supported housing initiative

A writer learns of this scheme, and as the world is devastated by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions, he tries to get his family to the last safe refuge. Disaster movie, with John Cusack and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.desc: Celine, a 24-year-old globetrotter, experiences a holiday on a wet, Welsh campsite with all seven of the noisy Jarman family. Putting up her own tent is just one of the challenges she faces, along with feeding the whole family for the same price she would normally spend on a starter and a drink at her favourite restaurant

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Expats Russell and Lindsay hope to attract punters to their convenience store with a selection of pastries, while retired nurse Susie and her husband Reg, who volunteer at a dog shelter, have their hands full with a littler of 10 puppies. Life coach Svetlana's online rants about the behaviour of expats on the Costa del Sol have gone viral. But as she prepares to record another monologue, she has a surprise up her sleeve

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: There is a scare when mysterious containers are found shortly after the Salisbury nerve agent crisis, while the two main lines between Didcot and Paddington lose power as rush hour nears and customers' tempers rise as congestion builds

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: A dodgy scrap dealer is spotted up to no good in County Durham, but his attempt to flee the grime scene is captured in evidentially invaluable technicolour. In Surrey, a pair of water engineers head out to tackle the damage caused to the UK's sewer system by some of the 11 billion litres of effluent flushed down British U-bends every day, while Malvern's enforcement officers Dan and Jude spend their days hunting for fly-tippers and rubbish dumpers, but need to get their prevention message across in a different way

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Officers stop a 16-year-old car thief in the early hours before he does any major damage, while a high-speed car and foot chase through the centre of Bradford ends in a gruesome smash. A young woman risks driving while drunk, but is saved by her black box, while another young speeder writes his car off in a spectacular fireball and emerges with a broken back. In Leeds, cops pursue a car obeying all the rules of the road - except the one requiring it to stop for the police

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The return after a break of the documentary following the work of officers from police forces across Yorkshire. Officers crack down on uninsured drivers whose recklessness raises everyone's premiums and kills more than 130 road users every year. In Halifax, a high-speed pursuit after one of these criminals ends in a devastating collision and foot race, while in Leeds a van courier is stopped, fails to deliver the correct paperwork to the cops, and then fails a drug test. Jamie Theakston presents

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Officers chase a car trying to escape the wrong way down the M62, a pursuit which ends in three arrests and the seizure of a van full of potentially stolen generators. Elsewhere in West Yorkshire, the Proactive Intercept Team seize more than £200,000 of unlawfully obtained cash, and in Bradford, officers Nicky and Claire are on hand to get an unsafe Golf off the roads

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Police officers race through the streets of Leeds on an extraordinary pursuit. Elsewhere in Huddersfield, Duncan and dog Tia join forces with the firearms unit, combining their expertise to bring two wanted men to justice. Later, Adie and Chris spend an evening lost in a forest after hunting down a wanted vehicle

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Ben and Steve pursue a dangerous driver in Bradford and end up chasing the suspect on foot after he does a runner when he loses control and crashes into parked cars, while Bobo and Beth go on the hunt for a hit-and-run driver who knocked a motorcyclist over

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of more dog owners at their wits' end dealing with their four-legged friends. He helps a woman teach a determined Doberman to obey not just her but her elderly parents as well, reunites two dachshunds who have gone from the best of friends to the worst of enemies, and tries to calm the ardour of a hairdresser's French bulldog

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Levi, rattled by the idea that Bea will never trust him, takes his anger out on Kyle. Ned and Sheila C's relationship takes an unexpected turn as they connect over art

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Roo tries to gain the assistance of an unemployed Ryder and Chloe at the Bait Shop. After a rocky start, Nikau's future as a model looks bright

programme.title: Sinkholes: Buried Underground
programme.desc: Cameras follow some of the people who have seen their houses and lives destroyed by the terrifying phenomenon of sinkholes

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: The Murder of Rhys Jones: What Happened Next
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of 11-year-old Rhys Jones in Liverpool in August 2007, an innocent child caught in the crossfire of a city's gang culture. The programme tells the tragic tale through interviews with friends, police on the case, and key politicians who had to deal with the fallout from a murder that shocked the nation

programme.title: My Lover My Killer
programme.desc: A millionaire whose obsessions shifted from spending a fortune on sex workers, tanks and guns to a controlling relationship with a woman involving blackmail and revenge

programme.title: After Earth (2013)
programme.desc: A spaceship crash leaves a renowned war hero and his 13-year-old son stranded on Earth, which was abandoned by the human race centuries ago. Since mankind's departure, the planet has become home to all manner of dangerous life-forms, and the boy must make a desperate journey across hostile terrain to secure a rescue for his injured father. Sci-fi adventure, starring Will and Jaden Smith, with Sophie Okonedo

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Artists David and Carol, who have been left with a shortfall in their UK pension after living abroad for years, try to sell some of their work at a market in Fuengirola. Campsite dweller and DJ Noel - who has a 10-year plan to buy a bar - gears up to spin tunes at his biggest gig of the year, the National San Juan festival. Cameras also follow former Playboy bunny Michelle and her husband Tony, who have taken advantage of the Costa's roasting heat and bought an awning company

programme.title: Paddington Station 24/7
programme.desc: The staff step back in time when they venture down into tunnels under the station to carry out fire safety checks, and it is the start of a bank holiday getaway for thousands of commuters. Jennie, Great Western Railway's new customer ambassador, manages to seat a troupe of young cheerleaders all together, but faces a much bigger challenge when fire alarms go off during rush hour

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Internet entrepreneur Martin and his partner in grime Glenn hear about a huge fly-tipping operation blighting a remote Hampshire beauty spot, and raise a small army of volunteers who roll up their sleeves to sort it themselves. Meanwhile, the UK's network of motorways and A-roads rely upon a system of lay-bys to help keep drivers safe, but these safe pull-in zones also attract an unsightly collection of filthy behaviour, and it falls to Huntingdon lay-by warriors Clive and Steve to take on the speeding traffic, atrocious weather, drunk drivers - and those people who confuse lay-bys with lavatories

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: The police deal with a suicidal young man with mental health problems, an Eritrean woman dumped out of a lorry by people traffickers, and a local lass who has quarrelled with her two-timing boyfriend. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: This episode focuses on car thieves, with the hunt for a stolen Ford Fiesta in Leeds ending in a dramatic foot chase as officers pursue one of the mouthiest criminals they have ever encountered. On the other side of the city, two men steal two high-performance cars before leading the cops on one of the longest pursuits in the history of the force as they criss-cross the county for more than an hour, frequently at speeds in excess of 150mph

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A speeding car crashes, leaving a passenger trapped inside while the driver flees on foot, and a drunken man kicks his partner out of the car and onto the hard shoulder before driving off with their children. Duncan and his trusty hound catch a burglar red-handed, and a man sleeping off a night of heavy drinking in his car gets a rude awakening

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A driver reverses his car into Bob's pursuing police vehicle three times before speeding down an off-road track, while handler Duncan and his trusty dog Tia are called in to search a house with an alarm that has been going off all night

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A car thief in Wakefield rams his way out of a petrol station before leading Jaffa, Chris and the rest of the team on a high-speed and highly dangerous pursuit. Big H and Stef can't believe their luck when two drug dealers park up right in front their unmarked car, while Wayne and Tom face some fighting talk from a 17-year-old, and a late-night collision with a Mini highlights the risks officers face on the road

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall arrives in Leeds, where English bulldog Wilson's destructive behaviour is making his owner so distraught that she is considering having him rehomed. Realising that this bolshie bulldog's behaviour is all for attention, Graeme sets about turning it around and to restore harmony to the home. Later, in Northampton, Graeme encounters Pomeranians Bella and Lola, who are attacking anything coming through the door

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Ned fights dangerous feelings for Sheila C after their moment of intimacy, and Toadie considers taking a romantic leap of faith with Mel

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mac loses her cool after Ryder arrives at Salt to ask for his job back. Chloe and Ryder try to plan their future. Jasmine's horrific tarot reading experience haunts her

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall's casebook starts with a broken bond between two best friends. Cairn terrier Ted has turned on his owner Mike after having a stroke and now Mike can't even cross his front room without Ted attacking him. Can Graeme help them pave the way back to friendship? There's a little girl's best friend, who is perfect at home, but a nightmare in the neighbourhood, leaving mum Jess so stressed out with his bad behaviour that if things don't change, she wants to rehome him

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: At Tencreek holiday park in Looe, Cornwall, new Yellow Coats Charley and Andi make their debuts as park mascots Deano and Sparky, while trouble in the toilet block puts park manager Rob in the firing line from an irate customer. Over in Somerset, Holiday Resort Unity's head of catering Sharon has to turn around the park's new burger joint in record time

programme.title: Filthy House SOS
programme.desc: Extreme cleaners Richard and Brennan head to Oxfordshire, where they come to the aid of a couple whose cluttered home is putting strain on their marriage. Sarah and Andy live in a four-bedroom detached house with their two children, four cats and one dog, but Andy is a hoarder who struggles to get rid of old family possessions that he just doesn't need, and Sarah is a spender, a shopaholic who buys clothes and jewellery for a fashion business that's yet to get off the ground

programme.title: The Gypsies Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary following travellers' constant struggle to co-exist with settled communities. Carol and her family cannot understand why her community is so hated and vilified, while local man Arthur is on a mission to understand what brings the travellers into parks and public areas - and Carol's caravan is his first stop. Johnny and his family live in a chalet in Essex but his non-traveller wife Andrea has had enough of feeling ostracised and wants to move back into a normal house

programme.title: The Lesbian Guide to Straight Sex
programme.desc: The team heads to Derbyshire where young couple Abi, an emergency dispatcher and children's football coach Dale have lost the spark in their relationship

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the personality of Patrick Mackay, who confessed to murdering 11 people in London and Kent in the mid-1970s. His victims included a Catholic priest, bludgeoned to death with an axe

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: Return of the documentary in which two families with different incomes exchange holidays to see if money can buy happiness. Just who really has the time of their lives when faced with windy campsites and basic bedrooms in Benidorm or luxury foreign villas and private yachts? And does the top 10 per cent ever want to share their loungers with the bottom 10 per cent?

Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sean Murray

programme.desc: A model dies while filming a reality TV show at a US Marine base, and an autopsy reveals she was killed by a drug overdose administered by someone else. programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A baseball star becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his limousine driver, who had been regularly supplying him with steroids. Briscoe and Green's investigation reveals blackmail as the underlying motive for the crime. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The charred body of an Asian girl is found outside the apartment of the Chinese consul general. Forensics discover she was murdered before her corpse was burned, prompting detectives to investigate rumours that the diplomat is somehow connected. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis trace a robbery suspect to a militia group, but McCoy is strangely affected by the leader's devotion to his cause - and begins to receive death threats once the case comes to court. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The discovery of a woman's body in the East River leads Briscoe and Green to investigate the drug-addicted brother of a famous footballer - and as the case unfolds, it becomes clear she may not have been the killer's only victim. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green think they have got their man when the prime suspect in a murder investigation knows every detail about the killing. However, when he claims he acquired his information from a psychic vision, the detectives have their work cut out. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Tony and Ziva disappear while searching for smuggled weapons at a shipyard. Gibbs is soon on the case and learns the pair were looking for a freight container thought to hold explosives from Iraq. McGee tries to get a GPS trace on the missing duo's mobiles, leaving the others struggling to find them before they come to serious harm. Michael Weatherly and Cote de Pablo star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A commander who knows the location of a shipment of nuclear fuel rods is abducted, and the team is called in to try to identify the kidnapper. However, as the investigation turns up new evidence, it appears someone might have had a very different motive for silencing the officer. Guest starring Zac Efron

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Following an active shooter lockdown at a naval hospital, the team searches for a suspect who fled the scene. it transpires that someone from Sloane's past is a key witness in the case. Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Maria Bello star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a hip-hop producer initially leads detectives to believe he was killed for reasons connected to his career, but evidence later emerges to suggest it was actually due to a romantic liaison. A suspect is finally identified - but a shock confession demolishes the prosecution team's case. Chris Noth stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The detectives are called in on Thanksgiving and assigned to find the missing daughter of the NYPD's first deputy commissioner - an investigation that ends in tragedy with the discovery of her body. Meanwhile, Goren is distracted from the case as he struggles with a personal crisis concerning his mother. Michael Biehn guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames investigate when an outbreak of arson attacks on churches culminates in the death of a St Gerald's employee. The trail soon leads to a man who donated $100,000 for restoration work on the building. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Barek investigate a troubled teenager after his parents are found murdered in their suburban home. They are convinced the youngster is innocent - even though he confesses to the crime. Meanwhile, Deakins spends his last two weeks on the job preparing for his future

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason helps respectable family man Jim Grayson, who was arrested for changing his identity after being the unwitting getaway driver in a fatal robbery years ago. Bull hopes they can convince the jury that Jim has redeemed himself for his past misdeeds by living an upstanding life for years

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: A friend from Jason's past enlists his services to help convince a jury that a domestic abuse survivor who shot her husband in his sleep is not guilty of murder because she feared for her life and the life of her unborn child. Michael Weatherly stars

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: A one-off edition of the documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions. Nick visits Stafford to meet seasoned CCTV operator and ex-police officer Barbara, who helps catch a drug user after spotting him on camera. Plus, control room operative Chris is on the lookout for regular shoplifters in Woking, while mild-mannered Jo foils a gang of thieves in Huntingdonshire

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home

programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Broadway production comes to Cabot Cove and it is not long before the main star's manager is killed. Fortunately, Jessica is in the stalls to see justice done. With Angela Lansbury

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A commander who knows the location of a shipment of nuclear fuel rods is abducted, and the team is called in to try to identify the kidnapper. However, as the investigation turns up new evidence, it appears someone might have had a very different motive for silencing the officer. Guest starring Zac Efron

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The wives of two marines are murdered, and although Gibbs initially suspects they were victims of domestic violence, subsequent developments suggest the case may involve professional killers who already have their next victim in mind. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A high-school student is killed by a hit-and-run driver, with tyre marks at the scene indicating it was deliberate. The case is complicated when the chief suspect is murdered by his mother. Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bookmaker is arrested on suspicion of murdering his business partner - and his attorney puts together an unconventional case that effectively turns the whole trial into a political statement. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Baltimore detectives Munch and Falsone head for pastures new, travelling to New York to aid the investigation into the death of a teenage model, while McCoy has a fight on his hands with the attorney representing the victim's parents. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Richard Belzer and Jon Seda, with Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The admissions director of an exclusive Manhattan elementary school is bludgeoned to death and Briscoe and Green initially believe she was murdered by a parent determined to have their child enrolled. However, as their investigation continues, a member of the school's staff comes under suspicion. Guest starring Roger Rees, with Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of a Russian model, and when the autopsy reveals a host of old injuries they suspect long-term abuse. Further tests are made on the body, and the findings suggest medical malpractice may have been the cause, leading the detectives to track down the person responsible for her death. Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy faces bad memories when a drunk driver kills three people - and finds himself forced to protect the perpetrator in the process. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects a desperate US Marine may have faked his own death with the help of a friend and blown up an ambulance in a botched attempt to cover all traces of the subterfuge. Subsequent developments, including a mysterious disappearance, seem to confirm the hypothesis - until a timely discovery by Abby throws new light on the case

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team raids an illegal motor business run by US navy officers and find a marine's severed head in the boot of a car. Tony succeeds in tracking down the owner of the stolen vehicle with the help of McGee's hacking skills, while Abby tries to discover the identity of the dead man. Mark Harmon and Pauley Perrette star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The agents are called to a national forest where several women have gone missing and conclude there may be a serial killer at large - a theory confirmed in gruesome fashion as the investigation proceeds. Drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Evidence at the murder scenes of an outspoken DJ and the housekeeper who supplied him with drugs leads the team to a detox expert whose mental illness strikes a chord with Goren. Detective drama, guest starring Tatum O'Neal and Fisher Stevens, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler investigate the death of former child star Alvin Stevens, following a trail of clues that leads them to Albanian mobsters and a DVD counterfeiting operation. As inquiries proceed, they also encounter a washed-up celebrity who enjoyed screen success as a youngster. Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson star

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Detectives Logan and Wheeler investigate when a popular online video blogger is apparently kidnapped during a live broadcast, but begin to doubt the crime really occurred. However, the case takes a strange turn when a ransom demand is made. Michelle Trachtenberg guest stars, and veteran US news reporter Larry King appears as himself

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: An investigation is launched into the death of a former ambassador's daughter and another murder carried out in the same vein. Goren's old mentor arrives on the scene with firm ideas about the case, but it is not long before the finger of suspicion is pointed at him as Eames disappears from her home. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio, Kathryn Erbe and Jamey Sheridan

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan is joined by new partner Megan Wheeler to examine the murder of a womanising doctor, who died when his vintage motorbike was tampered with. As the pair delve deeper into the dead man's private life, they find his son's relationship with a teacher is not all it seems. Starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson, with Anne Dudek and Anton Yelchin

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: The team members fear that they're in over their heads when they take on the seemingly unwinnable case of Elliott Miles, a mute man facing the death penalty if he's found guilty of murder and arson. Elsewhere, Bull is stunned to learn that his ex-wife is remarrying

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: Jason's team is rocked when client Elliott Miles is found guilty of murder, and they must regroup as the trial enters the penalty phase in order to prevent him from being sentenced to death. But when new evidence emerges that could prove Elliott's innocence, Bull must find a way to present it in court without being found in contempt. Meanwhile, Marissa faces hard truths about her relationship with Bull

programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice

programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A notorious drug dealer is murdered and suspicion falls on two possible culprits - a priest with a reputation as a vigilante, and the father of a teenager who died of an overdose. Briscoe and Green attempt to discover whether either of them took the law into his own hands. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A witness to a jewellery store robbery that went tragically wrong fails to appear in court. McCoy suspects foul play - until it transpires the man has been on the run for the past 20 years. Police drama, guest starring Mandy Patinkin of Criminal Minds fame, with Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a baby given up for adoption could provide a clue to the death of a new mother - but the investigation also turns up long-buried family secrets. The detectives are forced to consider the possibility that racial prejudice played a part in the case

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Four murders occur in Manhattan, all of which seem to have been committed by the same sniper. Although the shootings appear random, Briscoe and Green suspect the deaths are linked and discover a connection between one of the victims and a former marine who is an expert shot with the rifle used in the crimes. Ty Burrell (Modern Family) guest stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have their hands full investigating four homicides, including the killing of a husband by his distraught wife and the murder of a woman who had a complex relationship with two brothers. They then have to look into the abduction of an expectant mother. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called to a high school on a marine base, where a pupil has taken his classmates hostage and is threatening to detonate a bomb strapped to his chest. Gibbs manages to enter the classroom in an attempt to dissuade the boy, but soon realises someone else may be controlling his actions. Drama, with Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is called to a frozen lake, where two children have discovered the body of a missing US Marine. The team searches the water for clues and finds three more bullet-ridden corpses, all of which have tattoos linking them to a notorious street gang. The case then becomes a race against time to discover what connects the murders before the serviceman's comrades seek revenge

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs is assigned to examine the apparent suicide of a Pentagon cryptographer suspected of spying. The case is thrown into disarray by the discovery of evidence indicating another person was present at the time of death - meaning the real mole may still be on the loose and has already killed at least once. Crime drama, with Mark Harmon and David McCallum

programme.title: Rules of Engagement (2000)
programme.desc: An embittered lawyer reluctantly defends a former Vietnam comrade-in-arms who has been court-martialled for opening fire on innocent civilians during a siege on the US embassy in Yemen. Courtroom drama, starring Tommy Lee Jones, Samuel L Jackson, Guy Pearce, Ben Kingsley, Philip Baker Hall, Anne Archer and Bruce Greenwood

However, when another supposed lover comes forward, their attention turns to a different source and they must combat a small-town police force trying to protect one of its own. Guest starring Brooke Shields

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Logan and Wheeler are forced to explain their actions after the stabbing of a fireman leads to a massive brawl and an official inquiry. When questions arise concerning the victim's sexual preference, the detectives link the crime to a similar murder 12 years earlier - but a secret the wife has been keeping could hold the key to solving the case. Drama, starring Chris Noth and Julianne Nicholson

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a marine's wife is shown live on the internet and inquiries point to two housewives who were running their own pornographic website, but have since vanished. The search for the missing pair begins with the webster administrator - and ends with a surprising discovery

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Fingerprint evidence implicates Tony in a woman's death and he finds himself accused of murder. Convinced of his innocence, the other members of the team set out to clear him - even though all the facts seem to indicate he is guilty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Michael Weatherly

For years, Peter struggled with a sense of rejection as a result of being parted from his natural parents at such an early age, but having overcome his resentments, he now seeks to answer some burning questions about his past. Meanwhile, 71-year-old north Wales resident Ron Williams asks for help in his lifelong quest to track down the estranged younger sister with whom he spent an idyllic childhood - until she was adopted away from the family. programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: Documentary following members of the New Zealand highway patrol as they witness some of the best and worst behaviour on the nation's motorways. The series focuses on Auckland, the country's largest urban area, and features motoring chaos including major traffic collisions, escaped animals and pedestrians on busy roads. Musical comedy, starring George Formby and Kay Walsh
